response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals and 30+ years of technical depth across all required languages, the resume lacks critical domain experience in experimentation platforms, metrics infrastructure, telemetry systems, and growth engineering—core responsibilities of this principal-level role. There is no evidence of building standardized experimentation frameworks, A/B testing systems, or statistical analysis for experimental design. The candidate appears to be a skilled IC5 product engineer with excellent craftsmanship, but lacks both the specialized domain expertise and demonstrated principal-level architectural leadership required for this experimentation systems-focused position.
strengths: 30+ years of technical experience spanning all required languages (C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript) with proven production-scale engineering handling millions of HTTP requests/second
Strong software craftsmanship foundation with demonstrated TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development practices; mentorship culture through workshops and open-source projects
Full-stack technical versatility across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure enabling ability to bridge product and platform concerns
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature-flagging systems, or rollout management—all foundational to this role's core responsibilities
Lacks data science, statistical analysis, and metrics/telemetry infrastructure background required to design measurement systems and understand experimental bias detection
Limited evidence of principal-level architectural leadership, leading multi-team initiatives, or cross-functional influence at enterprise scale; resume shows primarily individual contributor focus

key_factors.factor: Metrics, telemetry, and data analysis background
Technical breadth across required languages and production systems
